connect.rule.reference.CfnAbout: Information about the reference when the `referenceType` is `URL`. Otherwise, null. (Supports variable injection in the `Value` field.)

connect.rule.reference.Type.Description: The type of the reference. `DATE` must be of type Epoch timestamp.

connect.rule.reference.Value.Description: A valid value for the reference. For example, for a URL reference, a formatted URL that is displayed to an agent in the Contact Control Panel (CCP).
